fileId.description: Assigned file identifier — use this to reference the file in subsequent API calls

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to PUT the raw file bytes to. Send the file content with Content-Type and Content-Length headers matching the request.

expiresIn.description: Seconds until the upload URL expires. You must complete the PUT within this window.

maxBytes.description: Maximum allowed file size in bytes for this upload. Determined by your plan tier.

data.description: Response after requesting a file upload. Contains the pre-signed URL to PUT your file to.
data.title: UploadResult

schema.description: Success envelope containing the pre-signed upload URL and file metadata
schema.title: UploadResponse

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail
